title: theopsis × maliflora
intro: Theopsis × maliflora, also known as the hybrid firebush, is a cross between the firebush (Hamelia patens) and the tropical firebush (Hamelia coccinea). This plant is known for its vibrant red flowers and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its high concentration of antioxidants and flavonoids. The health benefits of Theopsis × maliflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
